---
title: "About"
---

#### Education

Macalester College (2024-present) <br>
BA in Geography with Geospatial Science and Data Science minors, expected Spring 2027<br>


Carleton College (2023-2024)

#### Experience

GIS Intern (Summer of 2025)<br>
AET | St. Paul, MN

Americorps Housing Stability Fellow (Summer of 2024)<br>
St. Andrew's Lutheran Church | Mahtomedi, MN

Office Assistant (2024-present)<br>
Macalester Fund | St. Paul, MN

Assistant Nordic Ski Coach (2023-present)<br>
Mounds Park Academy | St. Paul, MN
